title: Sweet Spot into VO2max Finisher
description: SS depletes fuel, VO2max challenges tired legs
purpose: Deplete fuel reserves at sweet spot, then challenge VO2max on tired legs

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 93% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/9. 90-93% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 93% for 17:15. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 17:15.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 17:15 at 93%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 93%, 85-100 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41% through. This is your workout. Own it. 93% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/9. 31 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 7 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/9. 48 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3 of 9. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 6 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3. 6 to go. 23 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/9. You're 69% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% complete. 115% for 1:30. Fatigue is real — maintain 85-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5 reps left. 21 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 5 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 115% for 1:30. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/9. 54 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% done. 4 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% done. 4 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 3 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/9. 3 to go. You've accumulated 42min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 6/9. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 6/9. You've accumulated 42min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% done. 2 intervals left. 17 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% complete. Rep 7/9. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 57 minutes of work done. 17 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7/9. 57 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 7/9. 50% FTP × 1:30. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 77% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 77% through session. Rep 8/9. You've done 45min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 59 minutes of work done. 15 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 59 minutes in. 115% FTP, 85-100 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 1:30 at 115%. Empty the tank. You've got 14 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 1:30 at 115%. Then 14min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 1:30 at 115%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 14 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:30 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 115% × 1:30. Then 14min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 81% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
